from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    from collections import defaultdict

    # mapping from predicate to a fragment generator (subject omitted)
    pred_map = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"was born on {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"was born in {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"was born in {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"is {o} tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"weighs {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"currently plays for {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"currently plays for {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"plays in the {o} position",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"competes in the {o} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"is managed by {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"plays at {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"was drafted in {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"was drafted in round {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"was selected with pick {o}",
        "draftTeam": lambda s, o: f"was drafted by {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"made debut with {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"formerly played for {o}",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"wears number {o}",
        "college": lambda s, o: f"attended {o}",
        "youthclub": lambda s, o: f"was in youth club {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"started active years in {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"is owned by {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"is based in {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"is led by {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"has anthem {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"has ethnic group {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"speaks {o}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"has general manager {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"is chaired by {o}",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"participated in season {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"uses currency {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"is called {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"has official language {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"plays at {o}",
        "universityTeam": lambda s, o: f"represents {o}",
        "mostChampions": lambda s, o: f"has most championships: {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"has leader title {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"is in {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"has UTC offset {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"is in time zone {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"covers an area of {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"was founded on {o}",
    }

    # group triples by subject
    subjects = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subjects[t.subject].append((t.predicate, t.object))

    subject_clauses = []
    for subj, props in subjects.items():
        fragments = []
        for p, o in props:
            frag_func = pred_map.get(p)
            fragment = frag_func(subj, o) if frag_func else f"{p} {o}"
            fragments.append(fragment)
        if len(fragments) == 1:
            clause = f"{subj} {fragments[0]}"
        else:
            clause = f"{subj} " + ", ".join(fragments[:-1]) + ", and " + fragments[-1]
        subject_clauses.append(clause)

    if len(subject_clauses) == 1:
        return subject_clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        return ", ".join(subject_clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + subject_clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
